chunks.en: I usually take my lunch break at noon.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい正午にお昼休憩を取ります。

chunks.en: I take my break after a long morning meeting.
chunks.ja: 長い午前の会議のあとに休憩を取ります。

chunks.en: For lunch, I often eat rice and chicken.
chunks.ja: お昼には、よくご飯とチキンを食べます。

chunks.en: For lunch, I sometimes buy a sandwich nearby.
chunks.ja: お昼には、近くでサンドイッチを買うこともあります。

chunks.en: I usually eat at my desk near my computer.
chunks.ja: 私はたいていパソコンの近くの自分の席で食べます。

chunks.en: Sometimes I eat in the break room with friends.
chunks.ja: 時々、友達と休憩室で食べます。

chunks.en: After eating, I like to take a short walk.
chunks.ja: 食べたあとは、少し散歩するのが好きです。

chunks.en: After my walk, I feel ready to work again.
chunks.ja: 散歩のあとは、また仕事をする準備ができた気分になります。

outline: Opening: when I take my break
Point 1: what I eat for lunch
Wrap-up: what I do after eating

modelTalk.text: I usually take my lunch break at noon. Sometimes I take it a bit later. It depends on my work. I often bring food from home. Today I've got rice and some chicken. I like simple food. It's easy and cheap. I usually eat in the break room. My friends eat there too. We talk and laugh a lot. Sometimes I go outside and buy a sandwich. The fresh air feels nice. After I eat, I drink some coffee. Then I take a short walk. It helps me wake up. Sometimes I check my phone for a bit. My break isn't long, but I like it. Then I'm ready for work again.

chunks.en: I usually take my lunch break at noon.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい正午にお昼休憩を取ります。

chunks.en: I take my break after a long morning meeting.
chunks.ja: 長い午前中の会議のあとに休憩を取ります。

chunks.en: For lunch, I often eat a rice ball and soup.
chunks.ja: お昼にはよくおにぎりとスープを食べます。

chunks.en: Sometimes I buy a bento from the store near my office.
chunks.ja: 時々、会社の近くの店でお弁当を買います。

chunks.en: I usually eat at my desk while I check email.
chunks.ja: 私はたいていメールを見ながら自分の席で食べます。

chunks.en: Sometimes I eat in the break room with my team.
chunks.ja: 時々、休憩室でチームの仲間と食べます。

chunks.en: After eating, I take a short walk to feel fresh.
chunks.ja: 食べたあとは、気分をすっきりさせるために少し散歩します。

outline: Opening: when I take my break
Point 1: what I eat for lunch
Wrap-up: what I do after eating

modelTalk.text: I usually take my break around noon. I feel hungry by then. So I stop my work and relax. Most days I bring my own lunch. I like rice, chicken, and some vegetables. Sometimes I buy a sandwich from the shop. I don't eat at my desk. I go to the break room with my friends. It's nice to sit and talk there. We eat slowly and we laugh a lot. After I eat, I make a cup of coffee. Then I go outside for a short walk. The fresh air helps me feel awake. After that, I'm ready to work again.
